headline: LyondellBasell (LYB) Price Target Sees an Upward Momentum at RBC Capital
summary: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE:LYB) is one of the 10 High Growth Chemical Stocks to Buy. On April 10, 2026, RBC Capital raised the price target on LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE:LYB) from $82 to $91. The firm maintained an Outperform rating on the stock. The update provided by the firm, as part of a broader research […]

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on LyondellBasell Industries, Raises Price Target to $77
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Vincent Andrews   maintains LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $52 to $77.
